Comment: Very easy A, but you still will learn a good deal about statistics. Qiu is a sincerely nice person who will listen to the class. Noncumulative Final, cheat sheets, easy projects and hints on homeworks. Honors is only a few extra problems on hw and tests.
Differentiates between honors and regulars with a few different questions on tests and a few extra hw questions, not a big deal.. oh and he allows cheatsheets

The only problem with him is his accent. If you want to learn statistics and not have any bizarre projects take him over miville. Class is required, a cheat sheet is allowed on tests, tests are very similar to homework, maybe 10 hw assignments for the semester. Also class is ridiculously curved. Before the final a 48% was a C.
